nodes.name: REFERENCE.md
nodes.summary: Index page for the vendored 'remotion-saas' Claude Code agent skill, pointing to sub-guides on choosing a framework/template, embedding the Remotion Player, and rendering, plus links to Vue/Angular/Svelte integration docs. This is bundled reference documentation for the agent tooling, not versus-engine's own source.

nodes.name: framework.md
nodes.summary: Vendored agent-skill guide listing official Remotion SaaS starter templates (Next.js App Router, Next.js Pages Router, Vercel Sandbox, React Router 7, Express render server) with links for cloning or referencing them.

nodes.name: player.md
nodes.summary: Vendored agent-skill guide showing how to embed an interactive Remotion preview in a React app using `@remotion/player`, including a minimal code sample and notes on syncing dynamic metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a short TSX code sample demonstrating the `<Player>` component API (component, durationInFrames, compositionWidth/Height, fps, controls props).

nodes.name: rendering.md
nodes.summary: Vendored agent-skill guide comparing programmatic Remotion rendering options (plain Node.js SSR, AWS Lambda, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Azure Container Apps, Cloudflare Containers), with a detailed step-by-step checklist for setting up Remotion Lambda.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains an enumerated operational runbook (9 steps) for Lambda setup, distinct from the other sibling docs which are mostly link indexes.
